caption: The video features a man seated in a radio studio, engaging in what appears to be a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a white cap, a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" printed on it, and headphones. The man is positioned in front of a microphone, with his hands clasped together on the table. Behind him, there are banners with the text "Unique Hustle" and stars, as well as a sign that reads "Where Bosses Talk!" The setting suggests a professional yet casual atmosphere, likely aimed at discussing business, entrepreneurship, or leadership topics. The man seems focused and attentive, possibly listening to a guest or preparing to speak.
